vibe_and_tone: Elite Athleticism, Biomechanical Precision, Authoritative, High-Conversion

brand_strategy.name: Axiom
brand_strategy.tagline: A precisão da biomecânica. O futuro da sua clínica.
brand_strategy.color_psychology: Breaking the 'hospital blue' cliché by using 'Obsidian & Bone' for clinical authority, with 'Kinetic Coral' to represent active movement, energy, and high conversion.

components_strategy.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none), solid primary or 1px border. Hover state must translate-y-[-2px] with increased shadow.
components_strategy.cards: Cardless approach or 1px border-border/40 with bg-secondary. Flat, no soft shadows. For active states, use a 1px primary border glow.
components_strategy.inputs: Flat bg-input, 1px border-border, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary. Sharp corners.
components_strategy.modals: Backdrop blur-xl, solid bg-background with 1px border-border. Sharp edges.
components_strategy.tables: Dense. border-collapse. Subdued header text (muted-foreground), high-contrast data.
components_strategy.forms: Progressive disclosure (steps). Each step takes full width, minimal distractions. Clear Next / Previous buttons.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark topography lines (resembling Baropodometry pressure maps)
Action shot of running shoes - showcasing athletic precision

sections: Hero: High-impact headline targeting extra income & clinical precision. Hero bg uses topography lines with bg-black/70 overlay. Primary CTA: 'Prescreva Axiom' (Start Prescribing).
Value Proposition: Bento grid detailing 1) No initial investment, 2) Simple 3-step order process, 3) Premium custom insoles delivered.
How It Works: Step-by-step visual timeline (Patient Consult -> Upload Data/Baropodometry -> Receive & Deliver).
Social Proof / Trust: Professional imagery, quotes.
Final CTA: Large text block, high contrast, encouraging registration.

features: Overview: Stats on ordered insoles, pending deliveries, total extra revenue generated.
Patient Registry: Simple CRM to manage patients.

New Order Form (Complex): Progressive step form. Step 1: Patient Select. Step 2: Foot Size & Type (Neutral, Pronated, Supinated). Step 3: Biomechanical Data (Baropodometry upload / photos). Step 4: Review & Payment.
Global Overview: Total active professionals, total orders, revenue.
Order Management: Kanban or dense table view of orders (New, In Production, Shipped).
Settings: Configuration for WhatsApp QR code (mocked), Mercado Pago API keys, SMTP settings.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Google Fonts: 'Space Grotesk' and 'Manrope' in index.html or global CSS.
Map the colors provided in the JSON to tailwind.config.js perfectly.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='cta-register', data-testid='form-next-step').
For the Complex Insole Order Form, use a multi-step progressive disclosure component (Stepper). Do not put all fields on one screen.
For the Admin Dashboard, the 'WhatsApp QR Code' configuration can be a simple mocked UI showing a dummy QR image and a status of 'Connected'.
Strictly avoid any generic hospital blues/greens. Stick to the Obsidian and Kinetic Coral palette to maintain the unique 'Performance Pro' aesthetic requested by the user.
Use Lucide-react for icons. Sharp, thin stroke-width (1.5).
Use Framer Motion for the Landing Page hero entrance and Bento grid stagger animations.
Ensure all Shadcn components (cards, inputs, buttons) are customized to have sharp edges (rounded-none) to match the high-contrast technical aesthetic.
